mapper.select:
select c.column_id, c.column_name, c.sort_order, c.create_by, c.create_time, c.update_by, c.update_time, count(n.content_id) as content_count from publisher_news_column c left join publisher_news_content n on n.column_id = c.column_id
and c.column_name like concat('%', #{columnName}, '%')
group by c.column_id, c.column_name, c.sort_order, c.create_by, c.create_time, c.update_by, c.update_time order by c.sort_order asc, c.column_id asc

select c.column_id, c.column_name, c.sort_order, c.create_by, c.create_time, c.update_by, c.update_time, count(n.content_id) as content_count from publisher_news_column c left join publisher_news_content n on n.column_id = c.column_id where c.column_id = #{columnId} group by c.column_id, c.column_name, c.sort_order, c.create_by, c.create_time, c.update_by, c.update_time
select column_id, column_name, sort_order from publisher_news_column where column_name = #{columnName} limit 1
select count(1) from publisher_news_content where column_id = #{columnId}
mapper.insert: insert into publisher_news_column (column_name, sort_order, create_by, create_time) values (#{columnName}, #{sortOrder}, #{createBy}, sysdate())
mapper.delete:
delete from publisher_news_column where column_id in
#{columnId}
